'''zhamuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foghorn|foghorn]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-m-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foghorn|foghorn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhamuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæmizhith|zhæmizhith]] || [[word:zhæmizhij|zhæmizhij]] || [[word:zhæmizhish|zhæmizhish]] || [[word:zhæmizhi|zhæmizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhamumuzhuth|zhamumuzhuth]] || [[word:zhamumuzhuj|zhamumuzhuj]] || [[word:zhamumuzhush|zhamumuzhush]] || [[word:zhamumuzhu|zhamumuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhamuzhuth|zhamuzhuth]] || [[word:zhamuzhuj|zhamuzhuj]] || [[word:zhamuzhush|zhamuzhush]] || [[word:zhamuzhu|zhamuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhamufzhuth|zhamufzhuth]] || [[word:zhamufzhuj|zhamufzhuj]] || [[word:zhamufzhush|zhamufzhush]] || [[word:zhamufzhuf|zhamufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhamuzhuthu|zhamuzhuthu]] || [[word:zhamuzhuju|zhamuzhuju]] || [[word:zhamuzhushu|zhamuzhushu]] || [[word:zhamuzhuku|zhamuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhamuzhuth|zhamuzhuth]] || [[word:zhamuzhuj|zhamuzhuj]] || [[word:zhamuzhush|zhamuzhush]] || [[word:zhamuzhu|zhamuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhamuzhuthul|zhamuzhuthul]] || [[word:zhamuzhujul|zhamuzhujul]] || [[word:zhamuzhushul|zhamuzhushul]] || [[word:zhamuzhukul|zhamuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhamuzhuthuthu|zhamuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:zhamuzhujuju|zhamuzhujuju]] || [[word:zhamuzhushushu|zhamuzhushushu]] || [[word:zhamuzhuku|zhamuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhamuzhuthun|zhamuzhuthun]] || [[word:zhamuzhujun|zhamuzhujun]] || [[word:zhamuzhushun|zhamuzhushun]] || [[word:zhamuzhukun|zhamuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhamuzhuthuoro|zhamuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:zhamuzhujuoro|zhamuzhujuoro]] || [[word:zhamuzhushuoro|zhamuzhushuoro]] || [[word:zhamuzhukuoro|zhamuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
